---
id: handle-rename-org-tag
title: "Rename a tag"
description: "Renames a tag across all links in the authenticated organization. Returns the updated tag list"

hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Rename a tag"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/api/tags/{name}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Renames a tag across all links in the authenticated organization. Returns the updated tag list
